creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #65)

No, the deletes show up properly in the patch, but you need to apply it with -E to have patch remove the empty files, and then possible remove the .orig files that patch leaves behind (or figure out how to have patch not leave them at all).

If you use svn, then svn patch /path/to/patch will do the right thing.
